primary_text:
I Googled "dog limping" at 2am instead of calling the vet. I knew it might be serious. I just could not face another $150 bill.

Best for Pet would have changed that. $50/month. Unlimited vet consults, $0 each. All vaccinations. $250 off dental. Annual blood and urine tests. 24/7 VetChat for the 2am moments.

Not insurance. No claims, no excess.

No joining fee. No waiting period. Cancel anytime.

Find a participating clinic near you.
headline: I Googled it instead of calling the vet.
description: $50/month. Unlimited consults, vaccinations, $250 off dental. No guilt.
cta: Find a participating clinic near you
creative_brief: Phone screen showing 2am Google search. Warm but honest.
